function.message: I reviewed the next inbox request and verified the listed OCR targets. Four requested files are present and readable, but the request includes a fifth filename variant that is not present, so I cannot complete the full five-file OCR task without guessing or silently doing a partial result.
function.rulebook_notes: Inbox processing requires completing one request fully or stopping without mutation when blocked; incomplete partial processing is not allowed.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox task explicitly requests OCR of five files in 00_inbox/724_next-task.md. I successfully read four specified purchase notes, but the additional requested filename variant (with a leading underscore) is absent from the purchases listing, leaving required input missing. Per workflow/rubric, this is a clarification-blocked task, so no files were modified or deleted.
